title: isoetes × jeffreyi
intro: Isoetes × jeffreyi is a hybrid species of Isoetes, commonly known as quillworts, a type of aquatic vascular plant that belongs to the family Isoetaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Isoetes × jeffreyi include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying the rhizomes, which can then be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
